dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8775 IH: Ending Predator Access to Union Power Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Wilson of South Carolina introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To amend the Labor-Management Reporting and Disclosure Act of 1959 to provide that individuals who have been convicted of sex offenses against minors may not serve in certain positions.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Ending Predator Access to Union Power Act.

subsection.text: Section 504(a) of the Labor-Management Reporting and Disclosure Act of 1959 (29 U.S.C. 504(a)) is amended by inserting after grievous bodily injury, the following: a sex offense against a minor,.
Section 504(a) of the Labor-Management Reporting and Disclosure Act of 1959 (29 U.S.C. 504(a)) is further amended by striking Act any and inserting Act, any.
The amendments made by this Act shall take effect 30 days after the date of enactment of this Act.
